title: The War of the Gargantuas
writer: Reuben Bercovitch, Ishirô Honda, Takeshi Kimura
actors: Russ Tamblyn, Kumi Mizuno, Kenji Sahara
plot: A giant, cannibalistic humanoid's rampage through Tokyo is halted by his more docile twin, but neither their reunion nor their scientist caretakers can prevent their eventual duel.
